stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 2, what are the requirements for a simulated instrument flight?

options.a: The aircraft must have dual controls, and a qualified safety pilot must occupy one of the control seats.
options.b: The aircraft must have a full set of flight instruments at each seat, and a pilot with an instrument rating.
options.c: The aircraft must have two complete sets of controls, a qualified safety pilot at one seat, and the safety pilot must have 360° vision.
options.d: The aircraft must have a full set of flight instruments at each seat, and a qualified flight instructor at one seat.
